underlying_goal: Review and improve a company engineering onboarding document against a Linear ticket's goals, making necessary edits directly to the Google Doc
friction_detail: Claude initially only fetched the main tab of the Google Doc missing other tabs the user had created, and encountered text matching/duplication issues during batch edits.
brief_summary: User wanted Claude to review and edit a Google Doc onboarding document against a Linear ticket's requirements; Claude successfully reviewed, made edits across multiple tabs, but initially missed additional tabs and had some edit duplication issues.
